name: market_data_delay
title: Market Data Feed Latency Spike
description: Simulates a degraded market data feed on NYSE with significant message delays causing stale pricing information.
background: A network switch on the NYSE colocation floor is failing intermittently, causing market data updates to be delayed by 30 seconds. Traders relying on real-time quotes may be making decisions on stale prices. The FIX connection stays up but the data throughput drops drastically.

steps.action: Verify all venue feeds show normal latency (<10ms)
Inject 30-second delay on XNYS venue feed
steps.expected_state: XNYS venue shows stale quotes; other venues (XTSE, XLON) update normally

steps.action: Route a buy order for AAPL
steps.expected_state: BrokerHost routes to non-XNYS venue with fresher pricing; order fills at non-stale price

steps.action: Monitor order fills for price discrepancies
steps.expected_state: Fill prices on non-delayed venues reflect current market; XNYS quotes lag

steps.action: Resolve scenario and reset XNYS feed
steps.expected_state: XNYS quotes resume normal cadence; all venues in sync
